title: athyrium sheareri
intro: Athyrium sheareri, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties that help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of Athyrium sheareri include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
